content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "那個人是誰？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那個人是誰？",
          "pinyin": "Nà ge rén shì shéi?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ge ren2 shi4 shei2?",
          "translation_en": "Who is that person?",
          "translation_ko": "저 사람은 누구예요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "那個人是我的朋友，他叫小明。",
          "pinyin": "Nà ge rén shì wǒ de péngyǒu, tā jiào Xiǎo Míng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ge ren2 shi4 wo3 de peng2you3, ta1 jiao4 Xiao3 Ming2.",
          "translation_en": "That person is my friend. His name is Xiao Ming.",
          "translation_ko": "저 사람은 제 친구예요. 이름은 샤오밍이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他長得怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "What does he look like?",
          "translation_ko": "그는 어떻게 생겼어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "他長得很高，頭髮短短的，戴眼鏡。",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de hěn gāo, tóufa duǎn duǎn de, dài yǎnjìng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de hen3 gao1, tou2fa duan3 duan3 de, dai4 yan3jing4.",
          "translation_en": "He is very tall, has short hair, and wears glasses.",
          "translation_ko": "그는 키가 크고, 머리가 짧고, 안경을 썼어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他的個性怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Tā de gèxìng zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 de ge4xing4 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "What is his personality like?",
          "translation_ko": "그의 성격은 어때요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "他個性很友善，也很幽默，大家都喜歡他。",
          "pinyin": "Tā gèxìng hěn yǒushàn, yě hěn yōumò, dàjiā dōu xǐhuān tā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 ge4xing4 hen3 you3shan4, ye3 hen3 you1mo4, da4jia1 dou1 xi3huan1 ta1.",
          "translation_en": "He is very friendly and humorous. Everyone likes him.",
          "translation_ko": "그는 성격이 아주 친절하고 유머러스해서 모두가 좋아해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does Xiao Ming look like?",
          "question_ko": "샤오밍은 어떻게 생겼습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Short with long hair", "Tall with short hair and glasses", "Short with no glasses"],
          "options_ko": ["키가 작고 머리가 길다", "키가 크고 머리가 짧으며 안경을 썼다", "키가 작고 안경이 없다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a friend's appearance and personality in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "介紹朋友",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你有認識新朋友嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yǒu rènshi xīn péngyǒu ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 you3 ren4shi xin1 peng2you3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you met any new friends?",
          "translation_ko": "새 친구를 사귀었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有啊，我認識一個女生，她叫小美。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, wǒ rènshi yī ge nǚshēng, tā jiào Xiǎo Měi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 a, wo3 ren4shi yi1 ge nü3sheng1, ta1 jiao4 Xiao3 Mei3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I met a girl. Her name is Xiao Mei.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여자 친구를 한 명 사귀었어요. 이름은 샤오메이예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "她長得怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "What does she look like?",
          "translation_ko": "그녀는 어떻게 생겼어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "她長得很可愛，眼睛大大的，頭髮長長的。",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de hěn kě'ài, yǎnjīng dà dà de, tóufa cháng cháng de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de hen3 ke3'ai4, yan3jing1 da4 da4 de, tou2fa chang2 chang2 de.",
          "translation_en": "She looks very cute, with big eyes and long hair.",
          "translation_ko": "그녀는 아주 귀여워요. 눈이 크고 머리가 길어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "她的個性怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Tā de gèxìng zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 de ge4xing4 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "What is her personality like?",
          "translation_ko": "그녀의 성격은 어때요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "她很活潑，也很溫柔，說話很好聽。",
          "pinyin": "Tā hěn huópō, yě hěn wēnróu, shuōhuà hěn hǎotīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 hen3 huo2po1, ye3 hen3 wen1rou2, shuo1hua4 hen3 hao3ting1.",
          "translation_en": "She is very lively and gentle. Her voice is pleasant.",
          "translation_ko": "그녀는 아주 활발하고 부드러워요. 말하는 것도 듣기 좋아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來她是一個很有趣的人。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái tā shì yī ge hěn yǒuqù de rén.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 ta1 shi4 yi1 ge hen3 you3qu4 de ren2.",
          "translation_en": "She sounds like a very interesting person.",
          "translation_ko": "그녀는 아주 재미있는 사람인 것 같아요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is Xiao Mei's personality like?",
          "question_ko": "샤오메이의 성격은 어떻습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Shy and quiet", "Lively and gentle", "Serious and smart"],
          "options_ko": ["수줍고 조용하다", "활발하고 부드럽다", "진지하고 똑똑하다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the description words.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Introduce a friend: describe their appearance and personality."
    },
    {
      "title": "描述老師",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你的中文老師怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 de Zhong1wen2 lao3shi1 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "How is your Chinese teacher?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어 선생님은 어떠세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我的中文老師很年輕，個子不高，瘦瘦的。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ de Zhōngwén lǎoshī hěn niánqīng, gèzi bù gāo, shòu shòu de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 de Zhong1wen2 lao3shi1 hen3 nian2qing1, ge4zi bu4 gao1, shou4 shou4 de.",
          "translation_en": "My Chinese teacher is very young, not tall, and thin.",
          "translation_ko": "제 중국어 선생님은 아주 젊고, 키가 크지 않고, 날씬해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他長得帥嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de shuài ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de shuai4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Is he handsome?",
          "translation_ko": "그는 잘생겼어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "他長得很帥，頭髮短短的，看起來很認真。",
          "pinyin": "Tā zhǎng de hěn shuài, tóufa duǎn duǎn de, kàn qǐlái hěn rènzhēn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 zhang3 de hen3 shuai4, tou2fa duan3 duan3 de, kan4 qi3lai2 hen3 ren4zhen1.",
          "translation_en": "He is very handsome, with short hair, and looks serious.",
          "translation_ko": "그는 아주 잘생겼어요. 머리가 짧고 진지해 보여요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他的個性怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Tā de gèxìng zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 de ge4xing4 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "What is his personality like?",
          "translation_ko": "그의 성격은 어때요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "他個性很認真，也很聰明，上課很有趣。",
          "pinyin": "Tā gèxìng hěn rènzhēn, yě hěn cōngmíng, shàngkè hěn yǒuqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ta1 ge4xing4 hen3 ren4zhen1, ye3 hen3 cong1ming2, shang4ke4 hen3 you3qu4.",
          "translation_en": "He is very serious and smart. His classes are interesting.",
          "translation_ko": "그는 성격이 아주 진지하고 똑똑해요. 수업도 재미있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來你喜歡你的老師。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái nǐ xǐhuān nǐ de lǎoshī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 ni3 xi3huan1 ni3 de lao3shi1.",
          "translation_en": "It sounds like you like your teacher.",
          "translation_ko": "선생님을 좋아하는 것 같네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對啊，他是一個很好的老師。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, tā shì yī ge hěn hǎo de lǎoshī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a, ta1 shi4 yi1 ge hen3 hao3 de lao3shi1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, he is a very good teacher.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그는 아주 좋은 선생님이에요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the teacher's personality like?",
          "question_ko": "선생님의 성격은 어떻습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Funny and lazy", "Serious and smart", "Shy and quiet"],
          "options_ko": ["재미있고 게으르다", "진지하고 똑똑하다", "수줍고 조용하다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on describing appearance and personality.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe your teacher: appearance, personality, and why you like them."
    }
  ]
}
